formulas.latex: \left\|\underset{i \in I}{\sum} \underset{g \in \Psi_{\left(n , t\right)} \cap A_{i}}{\sum} x_{i} \left(g\right) + w_{n , t} - 1\right\|_{2}^{2} = \left\|\underset{g \in \Psi_{\left(n , t\right)} \cap A_{i}}{\sum} x_{i} \left(g\right) + e_{i} \left(n , t\right) + w_{n , t} - 1\right\|_{2}^{2} = \left(\underset{g \in \Psi_{\left(n , t\right)} \cap A_{i}}{\sum} x_{i} \left(g\right)\right)^{2} + 2 \left(e_{i} \left(n , t\right) + w_{n , t} - 1\right) \underset{g \in \Psi_{\left(n , t\right)} \cap A_{i}}{\sum} x_{i} \left(g\right) + \left(e_{i} \left(n , t\right) + w_{n , t} - 1\right)^{2} = \underset{g \in \Psi_{\left(n , t\right)} \cap A_{i}}{\sum} x_{i} \left(g\right) + 2 \left(e_{i} \left(n , t\right) + w_{n , t} - 1\right) \underset{g \in \Psi_{\left(n , t\right)} \cap A_{i}}{\sum} x_{i} \left(g\right) + \left(e_{i} \left(n , t\right) + w_{n , t} - 1\right)^{2} = \left(2 e_{i} \left(n , t\right) + 2 w_{n , t} - 1\right) \underset{g \in \Psi_{\left(n , t\right)} \cap A_{i}}{\sum} x_{i} \left(g\right) + \left(e_{i} \left(n , t\right) + w_{n , t} - 1\right)^{2}

formulas.latex: \left\|\underset{i \in I}{\sum} \underset{g \in \Psi_{\left(n , t\right)} \cap A_{i}}{\sum} x_{i} \left(g\right) + w_{n , t} - 1\right\|_{2}^{2} = \left\|\underset{g \in \Psi_{\left(n , t\right)} \cap A_{i}}{\sum} x_{i} \left(g\right) + e_{i} \left(n , t\right) + w_{n , t} - 1\right\|_{2}^{2} = \left(\underset{g \in \Psi_{\left(n , t\right)} \cap A_{i}}{\sum} x_{i} \left(g\right)\right)^{2} + 2 \left(e_{i} \left(n , t\right) + w_{n , t} - 1\right) \underset{g \in \Psi_{\left(n , t\right)} \cap A_{i}}{\sum} x_{i} \left(g\right) + \left(e_{i} \left(n , t\right) + w_{n , t} - 1\right)^{2} = \underset{g \in \Psi_{\left(n , t\right)} \cap A_{i}}{\sum} x_{i} \left(g\right) + 2 \left(e_{i} \left(n , t\right) + w_{n , t} - 1\right) \underset{g \in \Psi_{\left(n , t\right)} \cap A_{i}}{\sum} x_{i} \left(g\right) + \left(e_{i} \left(n , t\right) + w_{n , t} - 1\right)^{2} = \left(2 e_{i} \left(n , t\right) + 2 w_{n , t} - 1\right) \underset{g \in \Psi_{\left(n , t\right)} \cap A_{i}}{\sum} x_{i} \left(g\right) + \left(e_{i} \left(n , t\right) + w_{n , t} - 1\right)^{2}

formulas.label: fdB.5
formulas.latex: \left\|\underset{r \in R}{\sum} z_{r} \times y_{r} \left(g\right) - \underset{i \in I}{\sum} h_{i} \times x_{i} \left(g\right) + s_{g}\right\|_{2}^{2} = \left\|v o l \left(g\right) - c a p_{i} \left(g\right) - h_{i} x_{i} \left(g\right) + s_{g}\right\|_{2}^{2} = \left(h_{i} x_{i} \left(g\right)\right)^{2} + \left(v o l \left(g\right) - c a p_{i} \left(g\right) + s_{g}\right)^{2} - 2 \left(v o l \left(g\right) - c a p_{i} \left(g\right) + s_{g}\right) \times h_{i} x_{i} \left(g\right) = \left(2 c a p_{i} \left(g\right) - 2 v o l \left(g\right) - 2 s_{g} + h_{i}\right) \times h_{i} x_{i} \left(g\right) + \left(v o l \left(g\right) - c a p_{i} \left(g\right) + s_{g}\right)^{2} = \left(s_{g}\right)^{2} + 2 \left[v o l \left(g\right) - c a p_{i} \left(g\right) - h_{i} x_{i} \left(g\right)\right] \times s_{g} + Q

formulas.label: d1e25002
formulas.latex: \left\|\underset{r \in R}{\sum} z_{r} \times y_{r} \left(g\right) - \underset{i \in I}{\sum} h_{i} \times x_{i} \left(g\right) + s_{g}\right\|_{2}^{2} = \left\|v o l \left(g\right) - c a p_{i} \left(g\right) - h_{i} x_{i} \left(g\right) + s_{g}\right\|_{2}^{2} = \left(h_{i} x_{i} \left(g\right)\right)^{2} + \left(v o l \left(g\right) - c a p_{i} \left(g\right) + s_{g}\right)^{2} - 2 \left(v o l \left(g\right) - c a p_{i} \left(g\right) + s_{g}\right) \times h_{i} x_{i} \left(g\right) = \left(2 c a p_{i} \left(g\right) - 2 v o l \left(g\right) - 2 s_{g} + h_{i}\right) \times h_{i} x_{i} \left(g\right) + \left(v o l \left(g\right) - c a p_{i} \left(g\right) + s_{g}\right)^{2} = \left(s_{g}\right)^{2} + 2 \left[v o l \left(g\right) - c a p_{i} \left(g\right) - h_{i} x_{i} \left(g\right)\right] \times s_{g} + Q

formulas.label: fdB.7
formulas.latex: \left\|\underset{r \in R}{\sum} z_{r} \times y_{r} \left(g\right) - \underset{i \in I}{\sum} h_{i} \times x_{i} \left(g\right) + s_{g}\right\|_{2}^{2} = \left\|v o l_{r} \left(g\right) + z_{r} y_{r} \left(g\right) - c a p \left(g\right) + s_{g}\right\|_{2}^{2} = \left(z_{r} y_{r} \left(g\right)\right)^{2} + \left(v o l_{r} \left(g\right) - c a p \left(g\right) + s_{g}\right)^{2} + 2 \left(v o l_{r} \left(g\right) - c a p \left(g\right) + s_{g}\right) \times z_{r} y_{r} \left(g\right) = \left(2 v o l_{r} \left(g\right) - 2 c a p \left(g\right) + 2 s_{g} + z_{r}\right) \times z_{r} y_{r} \left(g\right) + \left(v o l_{r} \left(g\right) - c a p \left(g\right) + s_{g}\right)^{2} = \left(s_{g}\right)^{2} + 2 \left[z_{r} y_{r} \left(g\right) + v o l_{r} \left(g\right) - c a p \left(g\right)\right] \times s_{g} + Q

formulas.label: d1e27360
formulas.latex: \left\|\underset{r \in R}{\sum} z_{r} \times y_{r} \left(g\right) - \underset{i \in I}{\sum} h_{i} \times x_{i} \left(g\right) + s_{g}\right\|_{2}^{2} = \left\|v o l_{r} \left(g\right) + z_{r} y_{r} \left(g\right) - c a p \left(g\right) + s_{g}\right\|_{2}^{2} = \left(z_{r} y_{r} \left(g\right)\right)^{2} + \left(v o l_{r} \left(g\right) - c a p \left(g\right) + s_{g}\right)^{2} + 2 \left(v o l_{r} \left(g\right) - c a p \left(g\right) + s_{g}\right) \times z_{r} y_{r} \left(g\right) = \left(2 v o l_{r} \left(g\right) - 2 c a p \left(g\right) + 2 s_{g} + z_{r}\right) \times z_{r} y_{r} \left(g\right) + \left(v o l_{r} \left(g\right) - c a p \left(g\right) + s_{g}\right)^{2} = \left(s_{g}\right)^{2} + 2 \left[z_{r} y_{r} \left(g\right) + v o l_{r} \left(g\right) - c a p \left(g\right)\right] \times s_{g} + Q
